content:
🚀 once | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Simplifying the process of self-hosting and managing Dockerized web applications.
✨ Key Features: • Easy installation of Docker-based web apps • Automatic updates • Automatic backups • System information dashboard • TUI and CLI interfaces
📖 Summary: ONCE is a platform designed to simplify the self-hosting of Docker-based web applications. It provides an easy-to-use interface for installation, automatic updates, backups, and system monitoring, catering to both TUI and CLI users.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
